🚀 Hiring: Machine Learning Engineer | ONLY W2

We are looking for a Machine Learning Engineer to join a fast-paced 
E-commerce team and build scalable ML systems that directly impact customer experience and revenue.

Location: Remote
Role: Contract
Work Experience: 8+ years

🔍 What You’ll Do:

✔️ Build, deploy, and optimize ML models in production
✔️ Own the full ML lifecycle (training → deployment → monitoring)
✔️ Develop scalable data pipelines on distributed systems
✔️ Design backend services & APIs for ML-driven applications
✔️ Collaborate with product, analytics, and engineering teams

✅ Must Have:
🔹 Strong Python development skills
🔹 Hands-on production ML experience
🔹 Experience with end-to-end ML lifecycle
🔹 Strong backend engineering fundamentals
🔹 Experience with customer-facing ML systems (recommendations, ranking, ads, etc.)

➕ Nice to Have:
🔸 Experience with vector databases / retrieval systems
🔸 ANN tuning knowledge
🔸 Exposure to TensorFlow or PyTorch

📩 Interested candidates, please share your resumes to: Keerthi@topsysit.com

🚨 We’re Hiring: Sr. Web & Azure Machine Learning Engineer (Remote) 🚨
📌 Note: Only USC Candidates
📍 Location: 100% Remote
 💼 Employment Type: Full-time / Permanent

Are you passionate about building end-to-end AI-powered applications and scaling them in the cloud? We’re looking for a Senior Web & Azure ML Engineer to drive full-stack development and the machine learning lifecycle on a cutting-edge Digital Tele-Optometry platform.

🔹 What You’ll Do
✨ Own the complete ML lifecycle in Azure – from data to deployment
 ✨ Build and deploy models using Azure Machine Learning Studio & Python SDK
 ✨ Develop MLOps pipelines with Azure DevOps (CI/CD for models & apps)
 ✨ Integrate ML models into .NET / ASP.NET Core applications
 ✨ Deliver scalable cloud-native web applications in Azure
 ✨ Ensure Responsible AI, monitoring, and performance optimization
 ✨ Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver innovative AI features

🔹 Tech Stack
💻 Azure ML, App Service, AKS, Application Insights
 💻 Azure DevOps, Git, CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code
 💻 C#, ASP.NET Core, SQL, JavaScript/TypeScript

🔹 Required Qualifications
✔️ 7+ years in web development (C#/ASP.NET, APIs, JS/TS)
 ✔️ 5+ years working with Microsoft Azure (production environments)
 ✔️ Hands-on experience with Azure Machine Learning (AML)
 ✔️ Strong expertise in MLOps, CI/CD, and model deployment
 ✔️ Solid understanding of data modeling, feature engineering & evaluation
 ✔️ Experience integrating ML services into production-grade applications

🔹 Nice to Have
➕ Experience with SignalR, real-time systems, or video platforms
 ➕ Exposure to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS)
 ➕ Knowledge of speech/AI pipelines (e.g., Whisper)
 ➕ Government / PIV environment experience

📩 Interested candidates can send their resume to ravi@omtechllc.com

Harshita Upadhyay

MBA in Human Resources (2023–25) | HR Intern | Passionate About Recruitment, Talent Acquisition & Employee Engagement | Mahakal Institute of Technology

🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior AI Developer 🚀

📍 Location: Pan India (Off Shore)
 🧑‍💻 Experience: 5–8 Years
 🔹️Client: Cognizant 

We are looking for a passionate and experienced Senior AI Developer to join our growing team. If you have a strong background in AI/ML and enjoy building intelligent systems using cutting-edge technologies, this role is for you!

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
 • Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML models and intelligent applications
 • Work on NLP, deep learning, and large language model (LLM) use cases
 • Build and optimize prompts for LLM-based applications (Prompt Engineering)
 • Develop scalable AI solutions on cloud platforms like Azure and AWS
 • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI capabilities into products
 • Analyze complex datasets and derive actionable insights
 • Deploy, monitor, and maintain AI applications in production environments

🔹 Required Skills & Experience:
 • Strong expertise in AI, Machine Learning, NLP, and Deep Learning
 • Expert-level skills in Prompt Engineering
 • Proficiency in Python and frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, or Keras
 • Hands-on experience with Azure OpenAI, Google Vertex AI, and AWS LLM services
 • Experience deploying AI solutions on Azure and/or AWS
 • Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving abilities
 • Excellent communication and teamwork skills

🔹 Nice to Have:
 • Experience with end-to-end AI lifecycle (data prep → modeling → deployment)
 • Familiarity with MLOps practices and tools
💡 Be part of an innovative team building next-gen AI solutions!

📩 Interested candidates can apply or reach out directly!

💌Email: Harshita@infowaygroup.com

US IT Recruiter | Specializing in Full-Cycle Technical Recruitment | Connecting Top Tech Talent with Leading Organizations

🚨 Urgent Hiring: AI & Big Data Engineering Specialist (Remote | India)

We are hiring for a high-impact role with AstraZeneca in the Analytics Engineering team. Looking for strong candidates in India with recent Pharma/Healthcare project experience.
📅 Interview slots available next week – fast-moving opportunity!

🔹 Role Overview
This role focuses on building scalable data pipelines, deploying machine learning models, and developing AI-driven automation systems using modern platforms like Databricks, Snowflake, and AWS.

🔹 Key Responsibilities
• Design & build large-scale data pipelines (Spark, Databricks, Snowflake)
• Develop ML models for predictive analytics & anomaly detection
• Build AI agents for workflow automation & decision-making
• Implement feature engineering & lifecycle management (MLflow, Feature Store)
• Optimize data workflows for scalability, performance & cost
• Collaborate with business & analytics teams for solution delivery
• Integrate modern AI/ML and GenAI capabilities into data platforms

🔹 Required Skills
• Strong Python & SQL expertise
• Hands-on with Databricks (Delta Lake, MLflow, AutoML, Feature Store)
• Strong Spark experience for big data processing
• ML knowledge (classification, regression, anomaly detection)
• Experience with AWS (S3, Glue, Lambda, IAM) & Snowflake
• Understanding of distributed systems & data architecture
• Experience in Pharma/Healthcare analytics (mandatory)

🔹 Nice to Have
• Exposure to Generative AI / LLM integrations
• Experience with Snowpark ML
• Knowledge of real-time/streaming data pipelines
• Familiarity with agent-based automation frameworks

💡 What We’re Looking For
• Strong problem-solving mindset.
• Ability to convert business needs into technical solutions.
• Excellent communication & collaboration skills.

📩 If you have relevant experience or can refer strong candidates, please share profiles ASAP, on abha06verma@gmail.com

• Experience with evaluation frameworks, metrics, and PEFT
• Ability to collaborate directly with Google product engineering teams
• Strong customer-facing communication and maturity
If you have strong experience building scalable AI systems on Google Cloud, we would like to connect. Please share suitable profiles.
